title: tephrosia supina
intro: Tephrosia supina is a perennial legume native to tropical Africa, known for its medicinal properties. It has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia supina include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and alleviating pain. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, and its leaves can also be dried and made into a tea.
